name: Pumpkin Cheesecake- Southern Living
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Firmly packed light brown sugar -- divided
3 packages Cream cheese (8 oz each), softened
recipeInstructions:
Combine crumbs, 3 tablespoons brown sugar, and butter. Press on bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Set aside.
Beat cream cheese and flour at medium speed with an electric mixer until creamy. Add pumpkin and the next five ingredients. Pour into prepared crust.
Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 225°F, and bake another hour.
Cool on a wire rack for 5 minutes. Combine sour cream and remaining 1 tablespoon brown sugar; spread over cheesecake. Bake an additional 5 minutes. Cool on a wire rack for 30 minutes; cover and chill overnight.
Note: To reduce fat and calories, you can substitute reduced-fat cream cheese, light sour cream, low-fat sweetened condensed milk, and 3/4 cup egg substitute for 3 eggs.
